# Pull Request

## Description
Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, no API changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Component
Which component(s) are affected?

- [ ] Backend (Rails API)
- [ ] Frontend (React)
- [ ] Worker Service (Sidekiq)
- [ ] Database migrations
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Payments
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure/DevOps

## Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] End-to-end tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Performance testing

### Test Configuration
* Operating System:
* Browser (if applicable):
* Ruby Version:
* Node Version:

## Checklist
Please check all that apply:

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works

### Testing
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have checked that my changes don't break existing functionality
- [ ] I have tested the changes in multiple browsers (if frontend changes)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if necessary
- [ ] I have updated any relevant API documentation

### Security
- [ ] I have reviewed my changes for security implications
- [ ] I have not introduced any sensitive data (passwords, API keys, etc.)
- [ ] I have followed secure coding practices

### Git-Flow Compliance
- [ ] This PR is from a feature branch to develop (for new features)
- [ ] This PR is from a hotfix branch to master (for critical fixes)
- [ ] The branch name follows our naming convention
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional commit format

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes
Add any other context about the pull request here.

## Reviewer Notes
For reviewers - please check:

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive and pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Performance impact considered
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
